items.english_meaning: With hardship, Allah brings ease.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Those who strive for Allah are guided to His ways.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Do not weaken or grieve; faith gives strength.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.arabic_excerpt: لَا يُكَلِّفُ اللَّهُ نَفْسًا إِلَّا وُسْعَهَا
items.english_meaning: Allah does not place on a soul more than it can bear.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.arabic_excerpt: وَمَن يَتَوَكَّلْ عَلَى اللَّهِ فَهُوَ حَسْبُهُ
items.english_meaning: Whoever relies on Allah will find Him sufficient.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Do not lose hope in Allah’s mercy.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Do not despair of relief from Allah.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Do not grieve; Allah is with us.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Support Allah’s cause and He will support you.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Be patient; Allah is with the patient.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Gratitude brings increase from Allah.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: What is ahead can be better than what has passed.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Your Lord will give until you are pleased.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Allah sees and hears; you are not alone.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Turning to Allah opens the door to rescue.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Call upon Allah; He answers.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Allah is with you wherever you are.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Faith and good deeds lead to a good life.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Do not fear or grieve; receive glad tidings.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Put your trust in Allah.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.arabic_excerpt: إِن يَنصُرْكُمُ اللَّهُ فَلَا غَالِبَ لَكُمْ
items.english_meaning: If Allah supports you, none can overcome you.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Faith in Allah guides the heart.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Allah has chosen you for a meaningful path.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Only Allah removes hardship.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Rejoice in Allah’s grace and mercy.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Your effort with Allah is never wasted.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Hearts find calm through the remembrance of Allah.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.arabic_excerpt: لَّن يُصِيبَنَا إِلَّا مَا كَتَبَ اللَّهُ لَنَا
items.english_meaning: Nothing reaches us except what Allah has written.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Remember Allah, and He will remember you.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Seek help through patience and prayer.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Allah is near and responds to sincere prayer.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Allah is enough for us and the best disposer of affairs.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.arabic_excerpt: لَا خَوْفٌ عَلَيْهِمْ وَلَا هُمْ يَحْزَنُونَ
items.english_meaning: Allah’s close servants need not fear or grieve.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: The Qur’an is healing for what is in the hearts.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Ask Allah to expand your chest and ease your task.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Do not fear; Allah is with you.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: My Lord is with me; He will guide me.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Rely on Allah; He is enough as a guardian.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Remember Allah often, morning and evening.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Is Allah not sufficient for His servant?
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Allah sends tranquility into the hearts of believers.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Do not be crushed by what passes or overly attached to what comes.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Believers should place their trust in Allah.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Take Allah as your protector and disposer of affairs.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Allah can open and relieve the chest.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Allah can remove heavy burdens.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Seek protection in the Lord of daybreak.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Seek protection in the Lord of mankind.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Allah is the King, the Holy, the Source of peace.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Allah hears and knows all things.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Allah is just and in full control.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Allah answers the distressed when they call Him.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Allah provides from places a person does not expect.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Every creature’s provision is with Allah.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Your provision and what you are promised are with Allah.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Allah is the Provider, the Possessor of strength.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Allah provides for creatures and for you.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Whatever you spend for good, Allah replaces it.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Giving for Allah is multiplied greatly.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Allah promises forgiveness and bounty.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Faith and taqwa open blessings from heaven and earth.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Gratitude brings increase.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Allah’s blessings cannot be fully counted.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Eat from Allah’s lawful and good provision.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Allah expands and restricts provision with wisdom.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Allah provides for children and parents.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Allah is the best of providers.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Allah provides for whom He wills without measure.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Ask Allah humbly for any good He sends down.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Allah expands and limits provision as He wills.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Allah created you, then provided for you.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: There is no creator providing from heaven and earth except Allah.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Allah expands and restricts provision knowingly.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Allah is gentle with His servants and provides for whom He wills.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Allah gives provision in measured wisdom.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Seek Allah’s bounty and remember Him often.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Work through the earth and eat from Allah’s provision.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Seeking forgiveness brings blessings and provision.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Seek help through patience and prayer.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Tests come through fear, hunger, loss, and hardship.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: In hardship, remember we belong to Allah and return to Him.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: The patient receive blessings, mercy, and guidance.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Be patient, remain firm, and be mindful of Allah.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Be patient; Allah is with the patient.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Be patient; Allah does not waste the reward of good-doers.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Beautiful patience is the best response.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Beautiful patience and trust in Allah bring relief.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: The righteous are patient seeking Allah’s pleasure.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Remain patient through harm and rely upon Allah.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Patience is better for those who endure.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Your patience comes only through Allah’s help.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Keep yourself patient with those who call upon Allah.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Command prayer and remain patient upon it.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: The patient are rewarded for their endurance.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: The patient are rewarded with high stations.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Those who are patient receive their reward twice.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Be patient; Allah’s promise is true.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Be patient over what happens to you.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Leadership and guidance come through patience and certainty.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: The patient are rewarded without measure.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Responding with good requires great patience.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Be patient like the strong messengers were patient.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Practice beautiful patience.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Be patient with the decree of your Lord.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Allah forgives all sins for those who turn back to Him.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Allah can replace bad deeds with good deeds.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: When believers slip, they remember Allah and seek forgiveness.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Whoever seeks forgiveness finds Allah Forgiving and Merciful.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Seek forgiveness and return to Allah.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Turn to Allah with sincere repentance.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Seek forgiveness from your Lord.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Allah loves those who repent and purify themselves.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Ask Allah for mercy and forgiveness after mistakes.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Allah is greatly forgiving to those who repent and believe.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: If you are grateful, Allah increases you.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Be grateful to Allah and do not deny His blessings.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Allah’s blessings are too many to count.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Gratitude benefits the grateful person.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: True gratitude is shown through action.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Recognize blessings as the favor of Allah.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: People choose either gratitude or ingratitude.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Speak of your Lord’s blessings with gratitude.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Allah made blessings available so you may be grateful.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.

items.english_meaning: Remember to be among the grateful.
items.source_note: English is a concise meaning/paraphrase, not a copyrighted word-for-word translation.
